nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment variable template for the Collabryx application defining Supabase credentials, AI provider API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, MiniMax), deployment URLs, and feature flags

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Configuration for the understand-anything code analysis tool controlling auto-update behavior and output language

nodes.name: diff-overlay.json
nodes.summary: Diff overlay tracking changed and affected file nodes between branches for the understand-anything knowledge graph

nodes.name: fingerprints.json
nodes.summary: File content fingerprints for detecting code changes across analysis runs in the understand-anything tool

nodes.name: assembled-graph.json
nodes.summary: Intermediate assembled knowledge graph data containing merged nodes, edges, layers, and tour information from codebase analysis

nodes.name: review.json
nodes.summary: Review findings from codebase analysis including detected issues, warnings, and analysis statistics

nodes.name: knowledge-graph.json
nodes.summary: Final knowledge graph output from understand-anything with nodes, edges, layers, and project tour information

nodes.name: meta.json
nodes.summary: Analysis run metadata tracking last analyzed timestamp, git commit hash, tool version, and analyzed file count

nodes.name: components.json
nodes.summary: shadcn/ui component library configuration specifying New York style, RSC mode, Tailwind CSS v4, and Lucide icons

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Project manifest for the Collabryx Next.js 16 application listing dependencies (React 19, Supabase, Three.js, Framer Motion) and scripts for development, testing, Docker management, and performance budgeting

nodes.name: manifest.json
nodes.summary: PWA web app manifest for Collabryx defining app name, display mode, theme colors, and favicon icon

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment template for the Python embedding worker service configuring Supabase connection, allowed origins, debugging mode, and log level

nodes.name: pytest.ini
nodes.summary: Pytest configuration for the Python worker test suite with asyncio support, coverage requirements (80% minimum), and custom test markers

nodes.name: render.yaml
nodes.summary: Render cloud deployment configuration defining the embedding worker service (Docker-based with auto-scaling), Next.js frontend static site, PostgreSQL database with backups, and persistent disk for model cache

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment template for the database seeding script with configurable limits for profiles, posts, connections, matches, conversations, messages, notifications, and mentor sessions

nodes.name: message_templates.json
nodes.summary: Seed data templates for generating realistic messages covering greetings, follow-ups, professional intros, collaboration topics, feedback, meeting requests, and closing messages

nodes.name: profile_templates.json
nodes.summary: Seed data templates for generating realistic user profiles with headlines, bios, and looking-for statements for testing and development

nodes.name: config.toml
nodes.summary: Supabase local development configuration for Collabryx defining API settings, database connection pooling, auth providers (Apple, Firebase, Auth0, AWS Cognito, Clerk), MFA, SMS via Twilio, Web3/Solana, storage, and edge runtime

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration with strict mode, ES2017 target, bundler module resolution, Next.js plugin, and @ path alias for the entire project

nodes.name: vercel.json
nodes.summary: Vercel deployment configuration specifying Next.js framework and US East (iad1) region for the frontend

nodes.name: ci.yml
nodes.summary: CI pipeline with four jobs: typecheck-and-lint, unit-tests (with coverage), integration-tests (with coverage), and build for pushes to main/develop branches and PRs targeting main

nodes.name: security.yml
nodes.summary: Security audit pipeline running npm audit with high severity threshold on pushes to main and all pull requests

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose service definition for the Collabryx embedding/matching worker with resource limits, health checks, tmpfs volumes, security hardening, and bridge networking

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Multi-stage Docker build for the Python embedding worker using uv package manager, with builder and runtime stages, model caching, non-root user, health checks, and uvicorn entrypoint

nodes.name: 20260531_fix_capture_event.sql
nodes.summary: SQL migration fixing the capture_event() trigger function that crashed on comments and post_reactions inserts due to unsafe COALESCE of non-existent NEW record fields across multiple tables

nodes.name: capture_event
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL trigger function that captures analytics events from post_reactions, comments, connections, messages, match_activity, and profiles tables using a CASE statement on TG_TABLE_NAME and inserts into the events table
